tasks.name: Create DashboardPage page object skeleton
tasks.purpose: Establish base structure for dashboard page object with constructor and page reference

constraints: Follow existing PO pattern from account.po.ts
Export DashboardPage class
Store page and auth references
No widget selectors yet (T2)

tasks.output_state: DashboardPage class with constructor accepting Page instance and auth property
tasks.acceptance_criterion: dashboard.page.ts file exists with DashboardPage class exporting page and auth properties
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.page.ts && grep -q 'export class DashboardPage' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.page.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add widget selectors to DashboardPage
tasks.purpose: Define locators for all 7 dashboard widgets using data-testid attributes

constraints: Add readonly locator properties for each widget
Use data-testid selectors: course-progress-widget, skills-spider-widget, kanban-summary-widget, activity-feed-widget, quick-actions-widget, coaching-sessions-widget, presentations-table-widget
Add page load indicator selector
Add error boundary selector

tasks.output_state: DashboardPage has 7 widget locators, page load indicator, and error boundary selector
tasks.acceptance_criterion: DashboardPage contains readonly Locator properties for all 7 widgets

tasks.name: Add helper methods to DashboardPage
tasks.purpose: Provide reusable methods for common dashboard interactions and checks

constraints: Add goToDashboard() method
Add waitForPageLoad() method
Add expectWidgetVisible(widgetName) method
Add expectNoConsoleErrors() method
Add expectLoadingSkeletons() method
Add expectEmptyStates() method

tasks.input_state: DashboardPage has widget selectors from T2
tasks.output_state: DashboardPage has 6 helper methods for common test operations
tasks.acceptance_criterion: DashboardPage contains goToDashboard, waitForPageLoad, expectWidgetVisible, expectNoConsoleErrors, expectLoadingSkeletons, expectEmptyStates methods

tasks.name: Create test file skeleton with describe blocks
tasks.purpose: Set up test file structure with describe blocks for each test category

constraints: Use authenticated user storage state
Create describe blocks: Page Load, Empty States, Populated States, Loading States, Error States, Responsive Layout, Navigation, Widget Interactions
No actual tests yet (added in T5-T12)

tasks.input_state: DashboardPage is complete with selectors and helpers
tasks.output_state: dashboard.spec.ts exists with 8 empty describe blocks and imports
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test file has 8 describe blocks with descriptive names

tasks.name: Write page load tests
tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard renders for authenticated user without console errors

constraints: Test: dashboard loads for authenticated user
Test: all 7 widgets render
Test: no console errors during load
Test: PageHeader shows correct title
Use page.on('console') to capture errors

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Page Load describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Page Load describe block contains 4 tests verifying dashboard renders correctly
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page Load block has 4 test cases checking load, widgets, console, and header
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 50 'Page Load' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts | grep -c "test('" | awk '$1 >= 4' | grep -q '4' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Write empty state tests
tasks.purpose: Verify new users see empty states with CTAs for all widgets

constraints: Test: course progress shows 0% with 'Start Course' CTA
Test: skills spider shows empty outline with 'Take Assessment' CTA
Test: kanban summary shows 'No active tasks'
Test: activity feed shows 'Your activity will appear here'
Test: presentations table shows 'Create your first presentation'
Test: coaching sessions shows 'Book a Session'
Use TEST_USERS.newUser with no data

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Empty States describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Empty States describe block contains 6 tests for each widget's empty state
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty States block has 6 test cases verifying empty state messages and CTAs
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 70 'Empty States' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts | grep -c "test('" | awk '$1 >= 6' | grep -q '6' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Write populated state tests
tasks.purpose: Verify widgets display real data correctly for active users

constraints: Test: course progress shows percentage > 0
Test: skills spider shows radar chart with data points
Test: kanban summary shows active tasks with titles
Test: activity feed shows recent activities
Test: presentations table shows user presentations
Test: coaching sessions shows upcoming sessions (if any)
Test: quick actions show contextual buttons
Use TEST_USERS.user1 with course/task/presentation data

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Populated States describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Populated States describe block contains 7 tests for populated widgets
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Populated States block has 7 test cases checking data display in each widget
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 80 'Populated States' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts | grep -c "test('" | awk '$1 >= 7' | grep -q '7' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Write loading state tests
tasks.purpose: Verify loading skeletons appear during data fetch using route interception

constraints: Test: loading skeletons appear on initial load
Test: skeletons match widget shapes
Use page.route() to delay responses by 2 seconds
Verify skeletons disappear after data loads
Check at least 3 widgets show loading states

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Loading States describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Loading States describe block contains 2 tests verifying skeleton appearance and removal
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loading States block has 2 test cases with route interception verifying skeletons
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 40 'Loading States' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts | grep -c "test('" | awk '$1 >= 2' | grep -q '2' && grep -q 'page.route' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Write error state tests
tasks.purpose: Verify error boundaries catch failures and display error UI with retry

constraints: Test: error boundary displays when loader fails
Test: retry button exists and is clickable
Test: error message is user-friendly (not stack trace)
Use page.route() to return 500 status
Verify error doesn't crash entire page

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Error States describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Error States describe block contains 3 tests verifying error handling
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Error States block has 3 test cases with route failures checking error UI
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 50 'Error States' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts | grep -c "test('" | awk '$1 >= 3' | grep -q '3' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Write responsive layout tests
tasks.purpose: Verify dashboard adapts correctly to mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports

constraints: Test: mobile (375x667) - single column layout
Test: tablet (768x1024) - 2-column layout
Test: desktop (1280x800) - 3-column grid
Test: presentations table is scrollable on mobile
Verify all widgets remain visible at each breakpoint

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Responsive Layout describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Responsive Layout describe block contains 4 tests for each viewport
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Responsive Layout block has 4 test cases checking layout at different viewports
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 60 'Responsive Layout' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts | grep -c "test('" | awk '$1 >= 4' | grep -q '4' && grep -q 'setViewportSize' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Write navigation tests
tasks.purpose: Verify clicks on CTAs and links navigate to correct pages

constraints: Test: 'View Kanban Board' link navigates to /home/kanban
Test: 'Start Course' navigates to /home/course
Test: 'Take Assessment' navigates to /home/assessment
Test: 'Create Presentation' navigates to presentation builder
Test: 'Edit Outline' navigates to presentation editor
Verify URLs change correctly after click

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Navigation describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Navigation describe block contains 5 tests for navigation flows
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Navigation block has 5 test cases checking URL changes after clicks
tasks.verification_command: grep -A 70 'Navigation' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts | grep -c "test('" | awk '$1 >= 5' | grep -q '5' && grep -q 'waitForURL' apps/e2e/tests/dashboard/dashboard.spec.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Write widget interaction tests
tasks.purpose: Verify interactive elements within widgets function correctly

constraints: Test: Quick Actions buttons are clickable
Test: Presentations table 'Edit Outline' buttons work
Test: Coaching sessions 'Join' button exists (if sessions present)
Test: Activity feed items are readable
Verify hover states and focus indicators

tasks.input_state: Test skeleton with Widget Interactions describe block from T4
tasks.output_state: Widget Interactions describe block contains 4 tests for interactive elements

tasks.name: Add dashboard test configuration to playwright config
tasks.purpose: Ensure dashboard tests run in CI pipeline with proper timeout and setup

constraints: Verify dashboard tests are not excluded
Set appropriate timeout (medium: 90s per test)
Ensure authenticated storage state is used
No additional project config needed (runs with main suite)

tasks.output_state: Config verified to include dashboard tests with proper settings
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard tests not in testIgnore array and use authenticated state
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'tests/dashboard' apps/e2e/playwright.config.ts || echo 'Dashboard tests enabled' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Run test suite and verify CI integration
tasks.purpose: Execute full dashboard test suite locally and confirm CI will run it

constraints: Run: pnpm --filter web-e2e test:e2e -- --grep 'dashboard'
All tests should pass
Generate HTML report
Verify no flaky tests (run twice if needed)
Check CI workflow includes E2E job

tasks.input_state: All tests written and config updated
tasks.output_state: Test suite passes locally with 0 failures
tasks.acceptance_criterion: pnpm --filter web-e2e test:e2e -- --grep 'dashboard' exits with code 0
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web-e2e test:e2e -- --grep 'dashboard' 2>&1 | grep -q 'passed' && pnpm typecheck
